title: chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. albicaulis
intro: Chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. albicaulis, also known as White Rabbitbrush, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the western United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are found in its leaves and flowers. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and wounds, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of White Rabbitbrush include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
